---
title: "WaveDrom"
---

Digital timing diagrams (@fig-hs) and register/bit-field layouts
(@fig-reg) from JSON. Click to zoom.

![Valid/ready handshake](figures/handshake.wavedrom.json){#fig-hs}

[view source: `handshake.wavedrom.json`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/examples/gallery/figures/handshake.wavedrom.json){.source-link}

![Instruction encoding](figures/register.wavedrom.json){#fig-reg}

[view source: `register.wavedrom.json`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/examples/gallery/figures/register.wavedrom.json){.source-link}
